title: India Search Reimagined
subtitle: Zero-to-one innovation for information access in diverse Indian markets.
problem_statement: Fragmented information access and language barriers hinder digital inclusion for millions in India.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs for information access in India.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry, identifying unmet user needs.

pillars.title: Access
pillars.insight: Users struggle finding relevant info in local languages.

pillars.title: Clarity
pillars.insight: Overwhelmed by irrelevant results, desire simple interface.

pillars.title: Speed
pillars.insight: Slow loading times frustrate users seeking quick answers.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: HMW empower users with local language search?
HMW integrate diverse regional content seamlessly?

data.name: Bing
pros: Offers search, less market share in India.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need quick answers in Hindi for my small business.
personas.bio: Small business owner in Delhi, uses smartphone for daily info, prefers local language content.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Finding recipes in Marathi is often difficult online.
personas.bio: Homemaker in Mumbai, tech-savvy, seeks specific content in regional languages for daily tasks.

insights: Where can I find this in Hindi?
I wish I could search in my language.

points.action: Replace generic search with hyper-local, contextual results.
Integrate voice search with real-time language translation.
Tailor search algorithms for regional content nuances.
Enhance visual search capabilities for object recognition.

pivot.before: Users struggle with English-centric search and irrelevant results.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from global-first to India-first, language-agnostic information access.
pivot.after: Instant, relevant, multilingual information at users' fingertips.

screens.title: Search Homepage
layout: Header (About, Store, Gmail, Images, Sign in)
Search Buttons (Google Search, I'm Feeling Lucky)

annotations.title: Search Bar
annotations.rationale: Central, prominent input for queries, clear icons.

annotations.title: Language Options
annotations.rationale: Offers diverse Indian language choices for inclusivity.

annotations.title: Sign-in Button
annotations.rationale: Clear call to action for user accounts and personalization.

data.finding: System status clear, search bar prominent.
Consistent branding and layout across platforms.
